parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  title:        $json.titles ? $json.titles.join(' OR ') : 'Data Scientist',
  sites:        $json.sites,
  limit:        $json.limit,
  remote:       $json.remote,
  hybrid:       $json.hybrid,
  onsite:       $json.onsite,
  city:         $json.city || '',
  adzunaAppId:  $json.adzunaAppId  || '',
  adzunaApiKey: $json.adzunaApiKey || ''
}) }}

parameters.content: ={{ '✨ No new listings since last run (' + $json.totalFound + ' jobs found, all previously seen)' }}
={{ '🔍 Found **' + $json.newCount + '** new job' + ($json.newCount === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' to analyze with AI...' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.ollamaModel, messages: [{ role: "user", content: $json.ollamaPrompt }], stream: false, format: "json" }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Restore embed context and mark this job as successfully sent
return [{ json: { ...$('Build Discord Embed').item.json, _wasSent: true } }];

parameters.content: ={{ '✅ Done — **' + $json.summarySent + '** job' + ($json.summarySent === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' sent, **' + $json.summaryFiltered + '** filtered out (' + $json.summaryTotal + ' analyzed total)' }}
